description.en: On every session start, instructs the agent to emit one line of 'project positioning + current stage' before answering. Uses a 4-step fallback chain: project root CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/README.md → package.json/pyproject.toml/Cargo.toml description → tasks/todo.md → last 5 commit messages.
description.zh: 每次会话开头注入指令，要求 Agent 在响应顶部输出『项目定位 / 当前阶段』一行。4 步判断链：项目根 CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/README.md → package.json/pyproject.toml/Cargo.toml 的 description → tasks/todo.md → 最近 5 条 commit message。

description.en: On every Stop event, scans the session jsonl for tool errors and user corrections, then persists them to (1) a daily raw jsonl, (2) Crucible failed-directions yamls + sidecar occurrences.jsonl, and (3) an optional Obsidian digest. Fingerprint formula matches scripts/crucible-bookkeep.sh and templates/crucible/schemas/. No LLM in path; budget < 5s; failure never blocks session end.
description.zh: 每次 Stop 事件扫描 session jsonl，提取工具错误和用户纠正信号，写入三处：(1) 每日原始 jsonl、(2) Crucible failed-directions yaml + sidecar occurrences.jsonl、(3) 可选 Obsidian 摘要。fingerprint 公式与 scripts/crucible-bookkeep.sh 及 templates/crucible/schemas/ 一致。全程无 LLM；预算 < 5s；失败永不阻塞会话结束。
